file_insights.scope: QuickLook integration with Auto-Claude plan specs
key_changes: Added acSpecId field to BopCardMeta with snake_case CodingKey mapping
Created AcPlan, AcPhase, AcSubtask Codable model hierarchy
Implemented conditional tab visibility (plan tab only shows when acSpecId and acPlan exist)
Added progress display in tabName() for plan tab (completed/total subtasks)
Created planTab() ViewBuilder with minimal progress display

patterns_discovered.description: Tabs filtered based on data availability (plan tab requires acSpecId and loaded acPlan)
Tab names augmented with completion counts (e.g., 'Plan (2/5)') for quantifiable tabs
Nested structures with Codable conformance for nested JSON deserialization
Swift camelCase properties mapped to JSON snake_case via explicit CodingKeys enum
ViewBuilder used for nil-safe conditional rendering of tab content

gotchas_discovered.description: Commit message references 'subtask-4-1' but task ID is 'subtask-5-1', possible version control inconsistency

gotchas_discovered.issue: acPlan state loaded but source unclear
gotchas_discovered.description: @State var acPlan: AcPlan? is declared but no visible initialization code in diff; unclear how plan JSON is fetched/decoded
planTab() only displays progress text, does not render phases/subtasks hierarchically despite AcPhase/AcSubtask model availability

gotchas_discovered.issue: No error handling for plan decoding
gotchas_discovered.description: If plan JSON fails to decode, acPlan stays nil silently; no user-facing error state

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully added Auto-Claude plan spec integration to QuickLook preview with conditional tab visibility and progress tracking
key_accomplishments: acSpecId field integrated into BopCardMeta with proper JSON mapping
Plan tab conditionally visible only when spec data is available
Progress counter (completed/total) displayed in tab name
AcPlan model hierarchy supports nested phases and subtasks
Followed existing SwiftUI and Codable patterns from codebase
approach_outcome.acceptance_criteria_status: PASSED - cargo build, cargo test, clippy, fmt all succeeded (per task outcome)

recommendations.recommendation: Implement full plan view in planTab() showing AcPhase headers with nested AcSubtask list; add visual progress bars or checkmarks for completed subtasks
Clarify and document where acPlan is loaded (likely needs .onAppear or init logic to fetch from meta.json or card bundle); add error state handling
Add ability to interact with plan view (expand/collapse phases, potentially mark subtasks as done if writable mode is enabled)
Add unit tests for AcPlan model decoding with valid/invalid JSON, test availableTabs filtering logic
Verify commit message matches actual subtask ID in version control system (jj); may indicate copy-paste error in task metadata
